title: Byron Hinterland
body: While the famous town of Byron wasn't too impressive for us, the rest of the region was magical. The people we met & the experiences we had will stay in my heart forever.

title: Sydney - The Nothern Beaches
body: The Nothern Beaches, Freshwater, was our home for the first few months in Australia. We had a great experience, discovering the region while working and saving to get our car, Fuji.
